persons.title: Person — Notify Mapping
persons.description: Select one or more notify services for each person. The first selected service is the primary device.

data_description.admin_person: Required only in single_admin mode. This person receives all notifications when home.

error.admin_required: Exactly one admin must be selected when Target Mode is single_admin.
